data.content: Implementation review passed. Verified: (1) per-beat collapse toggle defaults to collapsed via useState(false), (2) steps/notes/handoff capsules gated behind showExpandedDetails while description stays visible, (3) accessible disclosure button with aria-expanded/aria-label/title, (4) source-based contract tests cover default state and per-row control, (5) all quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 3/3 tests pass, build succeeds). No security issues or regressions.
